attributes.title: [Ticura] Inbound-only threat indicators
attributes.description: Indicators Ticura flagged as inbound-only (threats originating from outside, targeting your environment). Useful for ingress-monitoring detection rules.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter": [], "query": {"language": "kuery", "query": "_tier:\"data_hot\" and event.module:\"ti_ticura\" and not threat.indicator.expired:true and ticura.isInbound:true"}, "indexRefName": "kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
